# page

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN ‚Äî do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Block-based page editor.
- Sub-plugins:
  - **`attachment-block`** ‚Äî Shared web infra for attachment-owning page blocks: the reusable <AttachmentUpload> empty-state (click/drop/paste) funnel. Owns the single block‚Üîattachment link (page_blocks_attachments) and one generic reconcile bound to blocksChanged; FK cascade reclaims on delete.
  - **`audio`** ‚Äî Audio block type: upload an audio file and play it inline. Audio block type: registers its `data` schema (attachment) at the server write boundary.
  - **`bookmark`** ‚Äî Bookmark block type: paste a link into an empty block to scrape OG metadata server-side and render a rich preview card (title, description, site, favicon, og:image cached same-origin). Link-preview scraper for the bookmark block: fetches a URL (SSRF-guarded), extracts OG/Twitter metadata via HTMLRewriter, and caches og:image + favicon as same-origin attachments. Also registers the bookmark `data` schema at the server write boundary.
  - **`bulleted-list`** ‚Äî Bulleted-list block type for the page editor. Bulleted-list block type: registers its `data` schema at the server write boundary.
  - **`callout`** ‚Äî Callout block type: a tinted highlight box with a changeable leading icon and semantic color, for notes/tips/warnings. Callout block type: registers its `data` schema (icon + semantic color) at the server write boundary.
  - **`code-block`** ‚Äî Code block type: editable with live syntax highlighting, language picker, and copy button. Code block type: registers its `data` schema (code + language) at the server write boundary.
  - **`cover`** ‚Äî Links a page's cover image: registers the cover attachment-id collector with the shared block‚Üîattachment reconcile so the cover isn't orphan-swept.
  - **`divider`** ‚Äî Divider block type: a thin horizontal rule marking a section break; insert via `/divider` or the `---` markdown shortcut. Divider block type: registers its (empty) `data` schema at the server write boundary, rejecting stray keys like injected text.
  - **`editor`** ‚Äî Block-based document editor component and slot system. Block-based document editor ‚Äî tables, routes, and live state.
  - **`editor-collab`** ‚Äî Per-block content-CRDT server (content-agnostic): the page_block_docs state store, the per-block keyed live resource, the first-writer-wins doc-init seed, and the doc-update Yjs merge endpoint.
  - **`embed`** ‚Äî Embed block type: render an external URL (YouTube, Vimeo, ‚Ä¶) in a sandboxed iframe. Embed block type: registers its `data` schema (external URL) at the server write boundary.
  - **`file`** ‚Äî File block type: attach any file as a downloadable card; served via attachments. File block type: registers its `data` schema (attachment) at the server write boundary.
  - **`formatting`** ‚Äî Inline rich-text formatting marks for the page editor's selection toolbar.
    - Plugins:
      - **`bold`** ‚Äî Bold mark button for the page editor's selection toolbar.
      - **`code`** ‚Äî Inline-code mark button for the page editor's selection toolbar.
      - **`color`** ‚Äî Inline text-color control for the page editor's selection toolbar.
      - **`italic`** ‚Äî Italic mark button for the page editor's selection toolbar.
      - **`link`** ‚Äî Inline-link control for the page editor's selection toolbar.
      - **`strikethrough`** ‚Äî Strikethrough mark button for the page editor's selection toolbar.
      - **`underline`** ‚Äî Underline mark button for the page editor's selection toolbar.
  - **`heading`** ‚Äî Heading block types (H1/H2/H3) for the page editor.
    - Plugins:
      - **`heading-1`** ‚Äî Heading 1 block type for the page editor. Heading 1 block type: registers its `data` schema at the server write boundary.
      - **`heading-2`** ‚Äî Heading 2 block type for the page editor. Heading 2 block type: registers its `data` schema at the server write boundary.
      - **`heading-3`** ‚Äî Heading 3 block type for the page editor. Heading 3 block type: registers its `data` schema at the server write boundary.
  - **`image`** ‚Äî Image block type: upload via paste/drop/picker into an empty block, free-width resize, served via attachments. Image block type: registers its `data` schema (attachment + width) at the server write boundary.
  - **`inline-date`** ‚Äî Inline @ date mentions: type @ in any text block to drop a date chip or schedule a reminder; stored as a [[date:<iso>]] / [[reminder:<id>:<iso>]] token. Schedules and fires reminder notifications for inline `[[reminder:<id>:<iso>]]` tokens; reconciled from block text on every page.blocksChanged.
  - **`inline-page-link`** ‚Äî Inline page links: type [[ in any text block to drop a clickable page reference; stored as a [[<pageId>]] token and fed into the backlinks index. Backlinks extractor for inline `[[<pageId>]]` page links embedded in any block's text.
  - **`links`** ‚Äî Backlinks index for cross-page links: page_links edge table, extractor registry, reindex, backlinks resource. Backlinks index for cross-page links: page_links edge table, extractor registry, reindex, backlinks resource.
  - **`math`** ‚Äî Umbrella for KaTeX math in the page editor: block-level equations, inline math, and the shared renderer.
    - Plugins:

      - **`inline`** ‚Äî Inline math: type $$ in any text block to drop a live KaTeX-rendered formula; stored as a \(latex\) token, click to edit.

      - **`equation`** ‚Äî Block-level equation block type: a focusable LaTeX source editor with a live centered KaTeX render. Block-level equation type: registers its `data` schema (LaTeX source) at the server write boundary.
      - **`inline`** ‚Äî Inline math: type $$ in any text block to drop a live KaTeX-rendered formula; stored as a \\(latex\\) token, click to edit.

      - **`render`** ‚Äî Shared KaTeX renderer leaf for the page math plugins: <KatexMath/> plus the single home for KaTeX config and CSS.
  - **`numbered-list`** ‚Äî Numbered-list block type for the page editor. Numbered-list block type: registers its `data` schema at the server write boundary.
  - **`page-link`** ‚Äî Link-to-page block type: references another page as a clickable block; feeds the backlinks index. Link-to-page block type: references another page as a clickable block; feeds the backlinks index. Also registers the page-link `data` schema at the server write boundary.
  - **`quote`** ‚Äî Quote / blockquote block type for the page editor. Quote (blockquote) block type: registers its `data` schema at the server write boundary.
  - **`read-only-view`** ‚Äî Faithful, non-editable renderer for a page block forest, with optional per-block diff highlighting. Reuses the editor's block-handle metadata + rich-text runs model without mounting Lexical.
  - **`sub-page`** ‚Äî Sub-page block type: renders a child page inline in its parent's content flow as a clickable Notion-style page row. A void, text-less block ‚Äî selectable and arrow-navigable, but Enter/Backspace can never originate in it.
  - **`text`** ‚Äî Plain-text block type for the page editor. Plain-text block type: registers its `data` schema at the server write boundary.
  - **`to-do`** ‚Äî To-do / checkbox block type for the page editor. To-do (checkbox) block type: registers its `data` schema at the server write boundary.
  - **`toggle`** ‚Äî Toggle (collapsible) block type for the page editor. Toggle (collapsible) block type: registers its `data` schema at the server write boundary.
  - **`turn-into-page`** ‚Äî Turn into ‚Üí Page block action: convert a block into a sub-page in place, keeping its id, position, and subtree; the page row renders inline as the link.
  - **`url-paste`** ‚Äî Paste a URL into an empty text block to turn it into a bookmark or embed.
  - **`video`** ‚Äî Video block type: upload a video file and play it inline. Video block type: registers its `data` schema (attachment) at the server write boundary.
